systemStatus.detail: (1) Sling May 16 daily arrived 7:02 AM PT: 10 employees, 10 shifts, 57.92 hours, 0 OT, 0 uncovered. Saturday roster: Isael Salvador Narciso (Cook), Andrew Turner/Katharine Brown/Fred De Leon/Moe Danely (Bartenders), Cal Carter/Daniel Rodriguez/Gabriel Lopez galindo/Bri Kelley (Servers), Noel Nunez (Busser). (2) Yelp Ads live scrape May 16 7 AM PT: 30d 56.2k impressions / 765 page visits / 189 leads (80% from ads), 691 ad clicks. Billing May 1-15: $433.51 spend, $1.17 CPC, $3.98 CPL. 12mo: 800 ad leads / 760 organic / 51% ad share. (3) Google Ads live scrape FAILED — sign-in chooser shown; account session expired. Stale snapshot from May 13 retained. 5 Ads report emails last 48h (no disapprovals/auth-errors flagged in mail). Joal emailed to re-login at ads.google.com. (4) Toast May 15 DPS not yet arrived at 7 AM run time (expected ~7:38 AM PT). Group summary for Fri May 15 arrived 6:16 AM PT, no figures. Most recent DPS (Thu May 14) Gmail body still not parseable — manual check required. (5) TripAdvisor: no new email last 24h, no ad performance report. (6) Reviews backlog: 7 unanswered. NEW La Connolly 5★ Google May 15 (1 day, top priority). Dympna Pettit 5★ May 14 now 2 days. Deimos Somied 5★ now 6 days. Lisa O'Brien now 35 days. (7) Reservations today (Sat May 16): 17 guests across 3 bookings — Kayla Escobar 12:15 PM (11), Naseem Hyder 6:30 PM (4, Cherry Bomz fans, wants table near band), Joseph Estrada 7:00 PM (2). Tomorrow: no bookings. (8) GitHub PAT: 200 OK.
